artifact_id.description: ID of the registered artifact to ingest. Must reference a pdf_report, html_report, or text artifact.

source_context.description: Optional analyst-provided context about the report source, e.g., 'Mandiant APT29 report from March 2026' or 'CISA advisory AA26-073A'. Improves LLM extraction quality.

ioc_types.description: IOC types to extract. If omitted, all supported types are extracted.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence for including an extracted IOC. 'low' includes regex-matched IOCs that may be false positives (e.g., version numbers misidentified as IPs). 'high' includes only IOCs confirmed by LLM contextual analysis.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to process from PDF reports. Limits cost for very large documents.
